title: Spryzeen's Spectral Pumpkin Tools
body:
# Spryzeen's Spectral Pumpkin Tools
![Cover](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gCzn71cv/images/f97ecbb9945753a1984ef020f7414f3db0ad1559.jpeg)
<iframe width="600" height="500" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/M3wzC_W6nCw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Embark on supernatural journeys with our Spectral Pumpkin Tools Texture Pack!
Watch as your tools transform into spectral creations
Each imbued with the mysterious and dark essence of ghostly pumpkins

<details>
<summary>Features</summary>

- Full vanilla texture pack, you don't need any mod or something
- All of them have animated textures
- the pack uses core shaders to make some parts of tools emissive, you don't need optifine to see it glow!

</details>

<details>
<summary>Requirements</summary>

- None!

</details>

<details>
<summary>Known Issues</summary>

- Emissive textures don't works with shaders like complementary or BSL

</details>
